name: Black Widow
text: "Widowmaker" — Response: After you trigger the ability of a [[Preparation]] card you control, deal 1 damage to an enemy.
real_text: "Widowmaker" — Response: After you trigger the ability of a [[Preparation]] card you control, deal 1 damage to an enemy.
flavor: "My name is Madame Natasha. But you can call me Black Widow!"

linked_card.name: Natasha Romanoff
linked_card.text: Mission Prep — Response: After you play a Preparation card, draw 1 card. (Limit once per phase.)
linked_card.real_text: Mission Prep — Response: After you play a [[Preparation]] card, draw 1 card. (Limit once per phase.)
linked_card.flavor: "This is my mission and I will succeed."

name: Winter Soldier
text: Reduce the cost to play Winter Soldier by 1 for each [[Preparation]] card you control.
real_text: Reduce the cost to play Winter Soldier by 1 for each [[Preparation]] card you control.
flavor: "You shot at Natasha. That was your last act on Earth, pal."

name: Covert Ops
text: Action (thwart): Remove 4 threat from a scheme. Confuse the villain.
real_text: Action (thwart): Remove 4 threat from a scheme. Confuse the villain.
flavor: "It's all about calculating how willfully blind a person is going to be. And then exploiting that." —Natasha Romanoff

name: Dance of Death
text: Hero Action: Make the following 3 attacks in order: - Deal 1 damage to an enemy. - Deal 2 damage to an enemy. - Deal 3 damage to an enemy.
real_text: Hero Action: Make the following 3 attacks in order: - Deal 1 damage to an enemy. - Deal 2 damage to an enemy. - Deal 3 damage to an enemy.

name: Safe House #29
text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Safe House #29 and choose a [[Preparation]] card in your discard pile → add that card to your hand.
real_text: Alter-Ego Action: Exhaust Safe House #29 and choose a [[Preparation]] card in your discard pile → add that card to your hand.

name: Attacrobatics
text: Hero Interrupt (attack): When a boost card is turned faceup, discard Attacrobatics → cancel the boost icons on that card. Deal 1 damage to the villain for each boost icon canceled this way.
real_text: Hero Interrupt (attack): When a boost card is turned faceup, discard Attacrobatics → cancel the boost icons on that card. Deal 1 damage to the villain for each boost icon canceled this way.

name: Black Widow's Gauntlet
text: Resource: Exhaust Black Widow's Gauntlet → generate a [wild] resource for a [[Preparation]] card.
real_text: Resource: Exhaust Black Widow's Gauntlet → generate a [wild] resource for a [[Preparation]] card.
flavor: "Not only are they lethal, but they look good, too." —Black Widow

name: Grappling Hook
text: Hero Interrupt: When you reveal a treachery, discard Grappling Hook → cancel the effects of that treachery and discard it.
real_text: Hero Interrupt: When you reveal a treachery, discard Grappling Hook → cancel the effects of that treachery and discard it.

name: Synth-Suit
text: Black Widow gets +1 DEF. Hero Response: After you trigger the ability of a [[Preparation]] card you control, exhaust Synth-Suit → ready Black Widow.
real_text: Black Widow gets +1 DEF. Hero Response: After you trigger the ability of a [[Preparation]] card you control, exhaust Synth-Suit → ready Black Widow.

name: Widow's Bite
text: Hero Response (attack): After a minion enters play, discard Widow's Bite → deal 2 damage to that minion and stun it.
real_text: Hero Response (attack): After a minion enters play, discard Widow's Bite → deal 2 damage to that minion and stun it.

name: Agent Coulson
text: Response: After Agent Coulson enters play, search your deck and discard pile for a [[Preparation]] card and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.
real_text: Response: After Agent Coulson enters play, search your deck and discard pile for a [[Preparation]] card and add it to your hand. Shuffle your deck.

name: Quake
text: Response: After a minion schemes, exhaust Quake → deal 2 damage to that minion.
real_text: Response: After a minion schemes, exhaust Quake → deal 2 damage to that minion.
flavor: "I will bring this building down around you!"

name: Stealth Strike
text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. If that enemy is defeated by this attack, remove 2 threat from a scheme.
real_text: Hero Action (attack): Deal 4 damage to an enemy. If that enemy is defeated by this attack, remove 2 threat from a scheme.
flavor: "They'll never know what hit them." —Black Widow

name: The Power of Justice
text: Max 2 per deck. Double the number of resources this card generates while paying for a Justice (yellow) card.
real_text: Max 2 per deck. Double the number of resources this card generates while paying for a Justice (yellow) card.

name: Interrogation Room
text: Max 1 per player. Response: After you defeat a minion, exhaust Interrogation Room → remove 1 threat from a scheme.
real_text: Max 1 per player. Response: After you defeat a minion, exhaust Interrogation Room → remove 1 threat from a scheme.
flavor: "Oh, she's sorry! Let me get the keys and call you a car service!" —Misty Knight

name: Surveillance Team
text: Uses (3 snoop counters). (Enters play with 3 counters. When those are gone, discard this card) Action: Exhaust Surveillance Team and remove 1 snoop counter from it → remove 1 threat from a scheme.
real_text: Uses (3 snoop counters). (Enters play with 3 counters. When those are gone, discard this card) Action: Exhaust Surveillance Team and remove 1 snoop counter from it → remove 1 threat from a scheme.

name: Counterintelligence
text: Max 1 per player. Interrupt: When any amount of threat would be placed on the main scheme, discard Counterintelligence → prevent 3 of that threat.
real_text: Max 1 per player. Interrupt: When any amount of threat would be placed on the main scheme, discard Counterintelligence → prevent 3 of that threat.

name: Spycraft
text: Play only if you control a [[Spy]] character. Interrupt: When you reveal an encounter card, discard Spycraft → cancel the effects of that card and discard it. Then, reveal another card from the encounter deck.
real_text: Play only if you control a [[Spy]] character. Interrupt: When you reveal an encounter card, discard Spycraft → cancel the effects of that card and discard it. Then, reveal another card from the encounter deck.

name: Nick Fury
text: Forced Response: After Nick Fury enters play, choose one: remove 2 threat from a scheme, draw 3 cards, or deal 4 damage to an enemy. At the end of the round, if Nick Fury is still in play, discard him.
real_text: Forced Response: After Nick Fury enters play, choose one: remove 2 threat from a scheme, draw 3 cards, or deal 4 damage to an enemy. At the end of the round, if Nick Fury is still in play, discard him.

real_text: Max 1 per player. Hero Response: After a boost card is turned faceup, discard Target Acquired → cancel that card's boost ability.

name: Burn Notice
text: Give to the Natasha Romanoff player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Natasha Romanoff → remove this card from the game. • Discard the [[Preparation]] card you control with the highest cost. If you cannot, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.
real_text: Give to the Natasha Romanoff player. You may flip to alter-ego form. Choose: • Exhaust Natasha Romanoff → remove this card from the game. • Discard the [[Preparation]] card you control with the highest cost. If you cannot, this card gains surge. Discard this obligation.

name: Taskmaster
text:
[star] Taskmaster gets +1 SCH and +1 ATK for each upgrade you control. (Black Widow's nemesis minion.)

real_text: When Revealed: Place an additional 1[per_hero] threat here.

real_text: Guard. (While this minion is engaged with you, you cannot attack the villain.)

real_text: Max 1 per player. Hero Response (attack): After you take damage from an enemy attack, discard Counterattack → deal an equal amount of damage to that enemy.

real_text: Max 1 per player. Hero Response: After an ally you control is defeated, discard Rapid Response → put that ally into play from your discard pile and deal 1 damage to it.

real_text: Max 1 per player. Hero Interrupt: When you would take any amount of damage, discard Defensive Stance → prevent 3 of that damage.
